name: Soulforge Aptitude
descriptionTemplate:
This talent is only effective in the {Astral Reign} stages.
This Awakener's CON, ATK, and DEF +[Arg1]%, and they gain [Arg2] Keyflare upon their first {Rouse}.
The Final DMG of Lily's "Strike" +[Arg3]%, and the increase is doubled during Boss Battle. After being attacked by an {Ultra} enemy, gain Delayed HP Recovery equal to [Arg4]% of the HP lost from the attack. {Strike to Protect}'s DMG increase based on {Endure} stacks effect enjoys [Arg5]% DMG Amplification bonus.
